subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Your letter was received and the news of the diffusion of the fragrances of God brought joy and gladness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق نامه رسید از خبر انتشار نفحات الله سرور و حبور حاصل گردید جناب
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @newspapers and the media; publications, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement
